close_reason: Added manual Debug impls (dyn SigningBackend is not Debug, so derive fails)
description: Ed25519Signer, EcdsaP256Signer, and RsaPssSigner have no #[derive(Debug)]. What goes wrong: downstream code that #[derive(Debug)] on any struct containing one of these signers fails to compile. Users also cannot use {:?} or dbg!() for basic troubleshooting. The fix is #[derive(Debug)] on each struct — the inner Arc<dyn SigningBackend> field needs SigningBackend: Debug or the impl must be manual (e.g., write the backend name).
title: Missing Debug on signer adapter types
